name: Woven Banana Bark Floor Basket - Brightroom™: Blanket Storage, Wicker Decorative Basket, Round, 18.11" Brown
description:
Refresh the decorative storage options in your home with the natural flair of the Woven Banana Bark Floor Basket from Brightroom™. Woven with banana bark, this brown floor basket works well in a variety of spaces. This round floor basket features an open top to make it easy to stash away and remove throw blankets, extra decorative pillows and other items, and it's designed with cutout handles for easy carrying and movement around your home.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
